input.command:
git add Cargo.toml Cargo.lock .mcp.json colmena-core/ colmena-cli/ colmena-mcp/ config/trust-firewall.yaml && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: M0.5 — workspace refactor + MCP server skeleton

Split single crate into Rust workspace:
- colmena-core: shared library (config, firewall, delegate, queue, models, paths)
- colmena-cli: CLI binary (hook handler, notify, install) 
- colmena-mcp: MCP server with 4 tools (config_check, queue_list, delegate, evaluate)

Architecture: core has zero platform deps, CLI and MCP are thin adapters.
EvaluationInput type decouples protocol (hook JSON vs MCP) from evaluation logic.

53 tests passing. Two release binaries: colmena (2.5MB) + colmena-mcp (3.8MB).

built with ❤️‍🔥 by AppSec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1
